summary: Full E2E testing complete for Noir Ink studio MVP. Backend: 8/8 pytest tests passed (leads, bookings, validation, persistence). Frontend: all 21 requested flows verified including hero carousel auto-advance (3 slides, slide changed after 5.5s), hero CTA scroll, services (2 cards), gallery (8 items) + lightbox open/next/close, social proof, testimonials, location/maps iframe, final CTA booking form submission persisted to DB, lead popup appears after ~7s, submits to /api/leads, closes, sets localStorage flag and does not reappear on reload, WhatsApp button with correct wa.me href, and artists page (3 cards -> detail with 4 portfolio items).

issues: Slide indicator dots are present but lack data-testid='hero-indicator-N' attribute (only hero-slide-N exists). Non-blocking, but would improve testability.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: LeadCreate/BookingCreate treat missing first_name as 422 via Pydantic (OK), empty phone caught by explicit .strip() check (400). Good.
server.py: MongoDB _id properly excluded via projection {'_id': 0} in list endpoints. Good.
Consider adding phone/email format validation via Pydantic validators for stricter input sanity.
Consider adding a Hero indicator data-testid='hero-indicator-{i}' for consistency with hero-slide-{i}.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed leads and bookings via UI + API (popup: TEST_PopFn, final CTA: TEST_CTAfn, backend tests: TEST_John/TEST_Jane).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py. Frontend lead popup has 7s delay; tests must clear localStorage['noir_lead_submitted'] to trigger, or pre-set it to '1' to dismiss popup when testing other flows (it intercepts pointer events while open). Hero indicators lack data-testid; use '[data-testid^="hero-slide-"]' and check opacity to detect active slide.
